---
title: "CAHOOTS Analysis"
author: "Alex Gollier"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-05"
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(lubridate)
```

## Step 9: Monthly Aggregation

```{r}
# Find monthly call counts by agency and period
# EPD
eugene_monthly <- eugene %>%
  group_by(year_month, agency, period) %>%
  summarise(call_count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(city = "Eugene")

# SPD
spd_monthly <- spd %>%
  group_by(year_month, agency, period) %>%
  summarise(call_count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(city = "Springfield")

# MCSLC
mcslc_monthly <- mcslc %>%
  group_by(year_month, City, agency, period) %>%
  summarise(call_count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  rename(city = City)

# Combine into one dataframe
monthly_combined <- bind_rows(eugene_monthly, spd_monthly, mcslc_monthly)

# Check structure of results
glimpse(eugene_monthly)
glimpse(spd_monthly)
glimpse(mcslc_monthly)
glimpse(monthly_combined)
```

## Step 10: Proportion Calculation

```{r}
# Calculate total calls per city-month and each agency's proportion
monthly_combined <- monthly_combined %>%
  # Group by city and month
  group_by(year_month, city) %>%
  # Find proportions and get rid of extra grouping
  mutate(total_calls = sum(call_count), proportion = call_count / total_calls) %>% ungroup()
```


## Step 11: Time-Series 

```{r}
# Set CAHOOTS service stop date as reference line
cahoots_end <- as.POSIXct("2025-04-08")

# Plot monthly call volumes by agency (faceted by city)
monthly_combined %>%
  filter(city %in% c("Eugene", "Springfield")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year_month, y = call_count, color = agency)) +
  geom_line() +
  facet_wrap(~ city) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = as.numeric(cahoots_end), linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(title = "Monthly Call Volumes by Agency", x = "Month", y = "Call Count", color = "Agency") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
# Plot monthly call proportions by agency (faceted by city)
monthly_combined %>%
  filter(city %in% c("Eugene", "Springfield")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year_month, y = proportion, color = agency)) +
  geom_line() +
  facet_wrap(~ city) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = as.numeric(cahoots_end), linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(title = "Monthly Call Proportions by Agency", x = "Month", y = "Proportion of Total Calls", color = "Agency") +
  theme_minimal()
```

## Step 12: Before/After Bar Charts

```{r}
# calculate average monthly call counts by city, agency, and period
before_after_counts <- monthly_combined %>%
  filter(city %in% c("Eugene", "Springfield")) %>%
  group_by(city, agency, period) %>%
  summarise(avg_monthly_calls = mean(call_count), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(period = factor(period, levels = c("before", "after")))

# Plot bars for before & after per agency (faceted by city)
ggplot(before_after_counts, aes(x = agency, y = avg_monthly_calls, fill = period)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  facet_wrap(~ city) +
  labs(title = "Average Monthly Call Counts Before vs After CAHOOTS Service Stop", x = "Agency", y = "Avg Monthly Calls", fill = "Period") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r before-after-proportions}
# Calculate average monthly proportions by city, agency, and period
before_after_props <- monthly_combined %>%
  filter(city %in% c("Eugene", "Springfield")) %>%
  group_by(city, agency, period) %>%
  summarise(avg_proportion = mean(proportion), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(period = factor(period, levels = c("before", "after")))

# Plot bars for before & after per agency (faceted by city)
ggplot(before_after_props, aes(x = agency, y = avg_proportion, fill = period)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  facet_wrap(~ city) +
  labs(title = "Average Monthly Call Proportions Before vs After CAHOOTS Service Stop", x = "Agency", y = "Avg Proportion", fill = "Period") +
  theme_minimal()
```
